creator: rguyom@pobox.com
text:
icewm doesn't have any FreeBSD code for the option
	TaskBarShowCPUStatus.

Fix: This code requires icewm to be setgid(kmem) which probably isn't
	very secure. YMMV.

	If someone can tell me how to retreive CPU activity information
	without reading /dev/kmem, I would be very happy to rewrite this
	code !

How-To-Repeat: 	Put TaskBarShowCPUStatus=1 in your .icewm/preferences and restart
	icewm.
